segments.text: [Speaker Notes] Chapter 3, Opener, Luciferin + ATP + O2  oxyluciferin + AMP + PPi + light. Fireflies expend significant metabolic energy to attract mates via bioluminescence. How do organisms extract energy from their environment and use it to carry out critical cellular functions?
